younger brother.mnemonics: Sounds like 'Oh, toe-toe.' Imagine your younger brother always stubbing his toe.

brothers and sisters.mnemonics: Think of 'kyo-die.' Picture siblings playing a video game together and saying, 'If you lose (die) in Kyoto...'

man.mnemonics: Sounds like 'Oh, toko no hito.' Imagine a man saying, 'Oh, I'm just a 'toko' (guy) in this place.'

woman.mnemonics: Sounds like 'Oh, nonna hito.' Picture a woman saying, 'Oh, I'm nonna (not a) regular person.'

company.mnemonics: Sounds like 'kai-sha.' Imagine a company on the coast (kai) near the sea.

cafeteria; dining commons.mnemonics: Sounds like 'shoku-dough.' Picture a cafeteria where they always bake fresh dough.

department store.mnemonics: Sounds like 'depart.' Think of a place where you always depart with your money.

hair.mnemonics: Sounds like 'kami.' Imagine your hair feeling like divine (kami in Japanese means god) silk.

mouth.mnemonics: Sounds like 'coochie.' Remember by thinking of a baby's coochie-coo, often said while touching their mouth.

eye.mnemonics: Sounds like 'May.' Think of your eyes always brightening up in the month of May.
